description: Deterministic sample jobs — TPM, release governance, enterprise delivery, product, operations

jobs.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
jobs.raw_text:
Senior Technical Program Manager
Global Enterprise | Remote

Responsibilities
• Own release train, SDLC governance, and dependency management across 6 engineering teams
• Coordinate architecture reviews and CI/CD adoption for AWS cloud migration
• Lead cross-functional technical delivery with executive stakeholder management
• Facilitate PI planning, release calendar, and deployment governance

Requirements
• 8+ years technical program management in Fortune 500 enterprise environments
• Strong technical execution, release governance, and architecture coordination

jobs.title: Release Governance Lead
jobs.raw_text:
Release Governance Lead
Enterprise Corp

Responsibilities
• Own release train, SAFE, PI planning, and SDLC governance across portfolio
• Establish release calendar, deployment governance, and cutover management
• Partner with architecture board on release readiness and dependency management

Requirements
• Deep release governance and technical execution in global matrix organizations
• Experience with enterprise program governance and steering committees

jobs.title: Enterprise Delivery Director
jobs.raw_text:
Enterprise Delivery Director
Matrix Industries

Responsibilities
• Lead enterprise-wide program delivery across regulated industries
• Own steering committee cadence, portfolio governance, and benefits realization
• Coordinate cross-functional technical delivery and dependency management
• Executive stakeholder management for Fortune 500 transformation programs

Requirements
• Program governance, technical program management, and global matrix experience

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
jobs.raw_text:
Senior Product Manager
SaaS Platform

Responsibilities
• Own product roadmap and backlog prioritization for B2B platform
• Lead customer discovery, user research, and go-to-market planning
• Define product strategy and product-market fit with engineering partners

Requirements
• 5+ years product management with roadmap ownership evidence
• Strong product thinking, stakeholder management, and delivery execution

jobs.title: IT Operations Manager
jobs.raw_text:
IT Operations Manager
Ops Corp

Responsibilities
• Run operations for production systems with SLA management
• Own incident management, operational continuity, and NOC coordination
• Service operations governance and production support leadership

Requirements
• IT operations and run-state ownership in enterprise environments
• Operational management and delivery execution experience
